creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
mount |grep /compat/linux
devfs on /compat/linux/dev (devfs, local, multilabel)
linprocfs on /compat/linux/proc (linprocfs, local)
linsysfs on /compat/linux/sys (linsysfs, local)


freebsd-version -ku 
12.1-RELEASE-p5
